case_title: GREGORY LUC DINGLE VS. BRIDGER INSURANCE SERVICES, A CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85. SERVED AUG-04-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRIDGER INSURANCE SERVICES, A CORPORATION
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FROILAN ANTIPORDA (TEAM LEAD CLAIMS ADJUSTER) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRIDGER INSURANCE SERVICES, A CORPORATION
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY DINGLE, GREGORY LUC BRIDGER INSURANCE SERVICES, A CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DINGLE, GREGORY LUC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRIDGER INSURANCE SERVICES, A CORPORATION $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,910.00, DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT IN CAUSING PLAINTIFF'S LOSS OF INCOME. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DINGLE, GREGORY LUC AS TO DEFENDANT BRIDGER INSURANCE SERVICES, A CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-16-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GREGORY LUC DINGLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRIDGER INSURANCE SERVICES, A CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEPHEN WILLIAMS, VP. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OUTSIDE OF THE COURTROOM. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR PAYMENT IS FRUSTRATED, AT WHICH TIME A HEARING WILL BE HELD. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEPHEN WILLIAMS, EXECUTIVE VP FILED BY DEFENDANT BRIDGER INSURANCE SERVICES, A CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF GREGORY LUC DINGLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRIDGER INSURANCE SERVICES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY FROILAN ANTIPORDA (TEAM LEAD CLAIMS ADJUSTER). PLAINTIFF ORALLY AMENDS HIS CLAIM TO ONLY PURSUE THE CLAIM FOR LOSS OF INCOME (AND NOT THE CLAIM FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
